backend/main.mo: Main actor for the ICP backend that mixes in blob storage and authorization, and exposes CRUD endpoints for user profiles, clinics, services, social links, hero settings, and site content with admin session-token authentication.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old HeroSettings shape into the new IdleHeroSettings shape, preserving compatible fields and supplying defaults for new ones.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (footer redesign, Roboto font integration, hero settings editor expansion, etc.) to their affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose and notable prop/hook corrections.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines light and dark CSS custom property tokens for the design system (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) and applies base border and background styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell that sets the page title, preloads Google Fonts (Roboto, Inter, Space Grotesk), and mounts the React app via the Vite module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router tree with a public layout route (Header + Footer wrapping MainPage) and a standalone admin route, then exports the RouterProvider as the app root.
frontend/src/components/admin/AboutEdito: Admin editor component for the About section, allowing updates to the biography text and profile image via URL or base64 upload.
frontend/src/components/admin/ClinicsMan: Admin CRUD manager for clinic locations, supporting adding, editing, and deleting clinics with fields for name, address, phone, map URL, booking URL, and description.
frontend/src/components/admin/FooterEdit: Admin editor for the site footer description text, with a textarea input and save button backed by a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/HeaderEdit: Admin editor for the site title and hero background image, supporting text input for the doctor's name and image upload or deletion.
frontend/src/components/admin/HeroSettin: Admin editor for hero section visual settings including gradient colors, overlay opacity, glassmorphism, particle presets, and animation options, with a live preview and save functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/ImagesMana: Admin panel section for managing site images (hero background), wiring ImageUploadField to upload, URL update, and delete mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/ImageUploa: A reusable React component for uploading, previewing, updating via URL, and deleting images, with loading/error state handling.
frontend/src/components/admin/ServicesMa: Admin panel component for listing, adding, editing, and deleting medical services, including icon image upload/delete per service.
frontend/src/components/admin/SocialLink: Admin panel component for managing social media links with add, edit, and delete functionality using a form with platform suggestions.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Main admin dashboard component with a sidebar navigation that allows switching between content sections (header, hero, about, services, clinics, social, footer, images) and displays an overview with counts.
frontend/src/components/AdminLogin.tsx: Login form component for admin authentication, accepting username and password with show/hide password toggle and error display.
frontend/src/components/ClinicCard.tsx: Card component displaying clinic details (name, description, address, phone, map link, booking link) with optional inline editing via EditableField for name and description.
frontend/src/components/EditableField.ts: Inline editable text field component that shows a pencil-icon edit UI only when an admin session token is present, supporting both single-line and multiline inputs with save/cancel actions.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component that renders brand info, navigation links, social media icons, and clinic contact details sourced from the global content query.
frontend/src/components/GlassCard.tsx: Simple reusable card wrapper component with white background, border, and optional hover shadow transition.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed site header with scroll-aware background blur, desktop and mobile navigation links, and an admin login button.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps pages with the Header and a main content area rendered via TanStack Router's Outlet.
frontend/src/components/ParticleCanvas.t: A React canvas component that renders animated particle effects (dots, stars, snow, bubbles, DNA helix, etc.) based on configurable settings including count, size, speed, color, and opacity.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data (content, images, services, social links, hero settings, etc.) via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes (colors, footer tokens, gradients), and declares utility classes plus keyframe animations like aurora.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About section with a doctor's bio (editable if admin), a profile image, and a static credentials grid showing education, experience, specialty, and research.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Handles admin authentication by checking/storing session tokens and toggling between the AdminLogin and AdminDashboard components based on login state.
frontend/src/pages/Clinics.tsx: Renders a grid of ClinicCard components fetched from content, with optional inline editing of clinic name and description for admins.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the hero section with a configurable animated background (gradient, particles, parallax, glassmorphism) and an editable site title driven by hero settings from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/MainPage.tsx: Composes all public-facing page sections (Home, About, Services, Clinics, SocialMedia) and wires up admin-only inline-edit mutation handlers when a session token is present.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Renders a grid of service cards with icon, title, and description fetched from content, supporting inline editing of title and description for admins.
frontend/src/pages/SocialMedia.tsx: React page component that displays social media links fetched from content API as a grid of branded icon cards, supporting Facebook, X/Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube platforms.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Inter, Roboto, Space Grotesk), design-token-based color palette (HSL/OKLCH CSS variables), border radius, custom keyframe animations (aurora, float, gradient-mesh), and plugin registrations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording the current version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features including footer redesign, Roboto font integration, hero theme settings panel, and particle effect selection system.
